rationale: Elec. Code §274.003 is a procedural statute governing certification of constitutional amendments for the ballot. The proposed homestead exemption increase would simply pass through this process without requiring any change to the rule.
quote: For each proposed constitutional amendment, the secretary of state shall certify in writing for placement on the ballot:
_note: No conflict; §274.003 applies uniformly to all constitutional amendments and is agnostic to subject matter.
